Independent Threat Modeling Site

Security Lab

This page is separate from the mailbox UI. It runs attacker-versus-defender drills, explains what each attacker tried, which controls responded, and what residual risk remains.

Loading domain...
Operator Guest
Access Read-only
Open Mail UI

Lab Access

Reading evidence is public. Running a fresh drill uses a normal domain account.

Sign in to rerun the drill. The simulation itself is independent from the mailbox website and uses temporary isolated domains.

Overview

Loading the latest security evidence...

Threat Model

The lab frames what is being protected before discussing outcomes.

Methodology

Each drill uses the live protocol surface instead of mock answers.

Evidence Charts

Charts show the quantitative side. Scenario cards below explain what those numbers mean.

Attacker vs Defender
Scenario Matrix

Scenario Explanations

Each card explains the attack path, the defensive response, and the remaining exposure.

Hardening Priorities

These recommendations are generated from the current drill results.
